## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (e.g. `feat: ...`, `fix: ...`)
- [ ] A [changeset](https://github.com/changesets/changesets/blob/main/docs/adding-a-changeset.md) has been added if this changes public API or behaviour (`bun changeset`)
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`bun test`)
- [ ] Types check (`bun run typecheck`)
